channel.title: Architecture on Swee Tat Lim — Principal Platform Architect
channel.description: Recent content in Architecture on Swee Tat Lim — Principal Platform Architect

item.title: The Architectural Shift in Agent Orchestration: A Deep Dive into LangChain-Go and the MLOps Reality
item.description: Technical analysis of langchaingo, agentic framework alternatives, and a critical review of LangChain's architectural traps
